# Pull Request

## Standards read (mandatory — reviewer's first check)

> First action on this PR: read this section. Missing or thin → CHANGES-REQUESTED without reading the diff.

Always-required (every PR):

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` @ `<SHA>` — (how it applied to this PR)
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` @ `<SHA>` — (how it applied)
- [ ] `CODING_RULES.md` @ `<SHA>` — (how it applied)
- [ ] `STANDARDS.md` @ `<SHA>` — (how it applied)
- [ ] `docs/DOCUMENTATION_STANDARD.md` @ `<SHA>` — (how it applied)

Task-specific (from the task prompt's "Mandatory reading"):

- [ ] `<path>` @ `<SHA>` — (how it applied)

**If any box can't be checked truthfully:** STOP coding, document the gap, request guidance.
